publishedAbstract: * ODF/OCP backed PV's are failing to attach due to missing vmdk disks: ~~~ AttachVolume.Attach failed for volume "pvc-3fdd4073-1b7f-4a65-80f6-de141a61353b": File []/vmfs/volumes/5e28d4fe-e41432b2-cc25-58605fd9e272/kubevols/ocp4-rp-thrvr-dynamic-pvc-3fdd4073-1b7f-4a65-80f6-de141a61353b.vmdk was not found ~~~ * Failing to attach volume due to missing Datastores. ~~~ Warning FailedMount 4m44s (x175 over 42h) kubelet, test.example.com Unable to attach or mount volumes: unmounted volumes=[ceph-daemon-data], unattached volumes=[rook-ceph-crash c eph-daemon-data default-token-vtth7 rook-config-override rook-ceph-mons-keyring rook-ceph-log]: timed out waiting for the condition Warning FailedAttachVolume 2m42s (x1276 over 43h) attachdetach-controller AttachVolume.Attach failed for volume "pvc-3106ea34-c69b-4be3-b918-ea585d67a898": datastore 'dc-2020-07-2tb' not found ~~~ * Nodes are failing to boot up with: ~~~ File /vmfs/volumes/xxxxxxxxx-xxxxx/DATASTORE/ocp-node-xxxxx-dynamic-xxxxxxxxxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxxx-xxxxxxxxxxx.vdmk was not found ~~~
publishedTitle: ODF/OCP vmdk not found on Vmware deployments
